measurement.audio_source: synthetic (deterministic 440 Hz tone + light noise, per whisper_cuda_large_v3_rtf.rs::make_sample_pcm)

statistics.note: 5 consecutive measured passes (each preceded by an in-process warm-up transcribe that pays session build + weight upload + NVRTC JIT); wall clock is the second, timed pass.

sanity_gate.formal_gate_deferred_to: M2-14 self-hosted CUDA runner + M3-01 5% regression gate (see whisper_cuda_large_v3_rtf.rs docstring)

flash_attention_v2.note: The FA v2 launcher stub returns BackendUnavailable per T-follow-02/03. The VOKRA_CUDA_DISABLE_FA_V2=1 override (context.rs commit d469429) forces the decomposed path so the sanity gate can measure a real number today. Once launch_flash_attn_v2 lands, this override becomes unnecessary and the measured RTF is expected to improve (target < 0.10 per M2-14 formal gate).

backend.silent_cpu_fallback: forbidden (FR-EX-08); both decomposed and FA v2 paths stay on the GPU

hardware.vokra_ffi_model: raw dlopen(libcuda.so.1) + dlopen(libnvrtc.so.12); no cudart/cudnn/cublas/cudarc bundled (NVIDIA EULA install model + zero-dep NFR-DS-02)

how_to_reproduce: vastai search offers 'gpu_name=RTX_4090 num_gpus=1 verified=true rentable=true'
ssh in, install rust 1.86, git clone https://github.com/ayutaz/vokra.git

sanity_summary: On an RTX 4090, whisper-large-v3 (F16, 3.09 GB GGUF) transcribes 30 s of audio in 3.394-3.404 s wall (median 3.400 s), RTF ≈ 0.1133 through the decomposed self-attention path. This is a reference number, not the formal < 0.10 always-on gate — that number requires the FA v2 launcher to be implemented (deferred to M2-03-followup-rtf-sub-0.1 T-follow-02/03) and lives as an always-on regression gate at M2-14 / M3-01.

measurement.audio_source: synthetic (deterministic 440 Hz tone + light noise, per whisper_cuda_large_v3_rtf.rs::make_sample_pcm)

statistics.note: 5 consecutive measured passes (each preceded by an in-process warm-up transcribe that pays session build + weight upload + NVRTC JIT); wall clock is the second, timed pass. Default configuration: FA v2 wrapper enabled, gated by t_q >= 16 (autoregressive decoder-step t_q=1 falls through to decomposed path; encoder self-attn t_q=1500 hits FA v2).

sanity_gate.note: Well below the 0.15 sanity ceiling but above the 0.10 formal target. This is a stability confirmation measurement following the FA v2 gating landing (commit 3317683).

backend.path: FA v2 gated (t_q >= 16 → FA v2 kernel); decomposed 2 + 7·n_head chain elsewhere (t_q < 16, i.e., autoregressive decoder-step with t_q=1)

flash_attention_v2.landed_in_commit: 3317683 (feat(cuda): re-land FA v2 launcher with t_q gating (M2-03-followup T-follow-02/03/04))
flash_attention_v2.note: FA v2 is invoked for encoder self-attention (t_q=1500) but not for autoregressive decoder-step (t_q=1). This means the decoder critical path — which dominates whisper-large-v3 RTF because n_text_ctx up to 448 tokens can be generated — still runs through the decomposed path.

backend.silent_cpu_fallback: forbidden (FR-EX-08); both decomposed and FA v2 paths stay on the GPU

parity.note: The FA v2 kernel produces bit-identical output vs the decomposed path across all tested t_kv values, confirming numerical equivalence.

comparison_to_decomposed_baseline.note: The gated FA v2 path is ~17% slower than the pure decomposed path in this stability confirmation. This is outside the 5% baseline-noise band. Hypothesis: (a) FA v2 kernel is not faster than the decomposed path for encoder self-attn at t_q=t_kv=1500 on RTX 4090 with the current (Br=16, Bc=64, d_head=64) tile layout, and/or (b) the wrapper dispatch adds per-launch overhead. Full analysis and follow-up (weight caching, larger tiles, per-shape dispatch tuning) is tracked under M2-03-followup-rtf-sub-0.1 T-follow-05 / M2-14.

hardware.vokra_ffi_model: raw dlopen(libcuda.so.1) + dlopen(libnvrtc.so.12); no cudart/cudnn/cublas/cudarc bundled (NVIDIA EULA install model + zero-dep NFR-DS-02)

vokra_provenance.commit_message_short: feat(kokoro): T13-alpha text encoder rewrite + T16 nn helpers (M2-07)
vokra_provenance.relevant_prior_commit: 3317683 feat(cuda): re-land FA v2 launcher with t_q gating (M2-03-followup T-follow-02/03/04)
how_to_reproduce: same steps as decomposed baseline, EXCEPT: do NOT set VOKRA_CUDA_DISABLE_FA_V2=1
for i in 1..5; do repeat above; end
verify parity: cargo test --release -p vokra-backend-cuda --test parity_kernels_cuda flash_attn -- --nocapture

gated_fa_v2.sanity_summary: On the same RTX 4090 as the decomposed baseline, whisper-large-v3 with FA v2 gated (t_q >= 16) transcribes 30 s of audio in 3.962-4.025 s wall (median 3.969 s), RTF ≈ 0.1323. Parity vs decomposed path is bit-identical (worst |Δ| = 0.0 over t_kv ∈ {1,2,4,8,16,64,448,1500}). The RTF is 16.77% slower than the decomposed baseline (0.1133 → 0.1323), outside the ~5% baseline-noise band; this is a real performance regression, not statistical noise. The formal < 0.10 always-on gate remains deferred to M2-14 (self-hosted runner) + M3-01 (5% regression gate), and the FA v2 tile / dispatch tuning needed to actually beat the decomposed path is tracked under M2-03-followup-rtf-sub-0.1 T-follow-05.
